caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of dark grey acoustic foam panels. He is wearing a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A silver professional microphone, mounted on a boom arm with the text "Rode NT1" visible, is positioned closely in front of him. In the initial sequence, the man looks slightly to his left with a neutral expression. As the sequence progresses, he begins to speak, opening his mouth and gesturing with his right hand. His expression becomes more animated and focused as he talks, with his hand moving upward into the frame. Throughout the clip, his position remains stationary while his facial expressions and hand movements shift to convey his speech.
